epics.title: Show bar-level harmonic annotations in the Goodbye chart

tasks.title: Extend the songs data model and score viewer to support concise inline analysis notes per measure
acceptance_criteria: The songs dataset supports an optional measure-level analysis note without breaking existing songs.
The score viewer renders the note in the same cell as the target chord so it reads like an annotation rather than a separate panel.
Goodbye includes Korean-language harmonic notes on representative bars across verse, pre-chorus, chorus, and modulation sections.
done_definition: The updated chart renders in the browser without collapsing the existing pane layout.

assumptions: A compact note block inside each measure cell is the least disruptive way to present theory commentary.
Representative bar annotations are sufficient; not every chart in the library needs analysis content immediately.
risks: Extra note text can make the grid too tall or cramped if measure cells are not resized carefully.
Repeated theoretical commentary can become noisy if the note styling competes with the chord itself.
